problem id: 10d29630
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(2) XOR SHL(5)

examples:
  10011010 -> 00101010
  00011011 -> 00001100
  00100111 -> 01111100
  00001010 -> 01101000
  10110101 -> 01110110
  00101111 -> 01011100
  00010110 -> 10011000
  00011111 -> 10011100
  10010100 -> 11010010
  01110111 -> 00111101

query: 01100010
predicted answer: 11001001
